+        total_loss = 0

+        progress_bar = tqdm(range(len(train_dataloader)), disable=not accelerator.is_local_main_process)

+        for step, batch in enumerate(train_dataloader):

+            # Remove any extra dimensions that might cause issues

+            for key in batch:

+                if isinstance(batch[key], torch.Tensor):

+                    # Ensure tensors have the right shape

+                    if batch[key].dim() == 3:

+                        batch[key] = batch[key].squeeze(1)  # Remove singleton dimension if present

+            

+            outputs = model(**batch)

+            loss = outputs.loss

+            

+            # Backward pass

+            accelerator.backward(loss)

+            

+            # Update weights

+            optimizer.step()

+            scheduler.step()

+            optimizer.zero_grad()

+            

+            # Update progress bar

+            progress_bar.set_description(f'Epoch {epoch+1}/{args.num_epochs}, Loss: {loss.item():.4f}')

+            progress_bar.update(1)

+
